name: The Bays Golf Club
about: The Bays Golf Club is a premium indoor golf facility in Bryan, Ohio, utilizing state-of-the-art GC Hawk Launch Monitors to provide an all-weather golfing experience across four simulator suites. It offers access to real-life PGA courses, a driving range, and performance-improvement software, with pricing based on an hourly fee per bay. The facility caters to golfers of all skill levels and includes a climate-controlled environment, a putting practice area, and a lounge space with TVs, making it suitable for both practice and social play. Beyond golf, it features multi-sport capabilities for soccer and footgolf, along with arcade-style games like skee ball and darts, positioning itself as a comprehensive entertainment and training destination.
why_golfers_like_it: GC Hawk Launch Monitors for precise ball and club tracking
Access to famous PGA courses like Pebble Beach and Augusta
Real-time performance analytics to improve your game
Junior golf programs and family-friendly atmosphere
Multi-sport capabilities for variety beyond golf

food_and_drink.notes: No food allowed inside the hitting bays. Snacks are available for purchase.
BYOB is not mentioned, indicating alcohol is not available.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art GC Hawk Launch Monitors used in all four simulator bays.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are responsible for their own equipment. The facility does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is allowed inside the hitting bays. Snacks and cold drinks are available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes one golfer roughly 1 hour to play 18 holes at an average pace. For four golfers playing 18 holes, plan on 4 hours.

faq.question: Is The Bays Golf Club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, it offers junior golf programs, a family-friendly atmosphere, and multi-sport games, making it suitable for kids.
